channel.title: SevenAtSevenLastSection
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SevenAtSevenLastSection, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Best Protein Sources for a Healthy, Balanced Diet
item.description: Looking to add more protein to your meals? Explore high-protein foods, including affordable options, to help meet your daily needs.

item.title: 5 of the Buzziest Books by BIPOC Authors to Read This Month
item.description: New Tayari Jones, a literary mystery that deals with trauma, a morbid coming-of-age tale, and fantastical stories with bite, and more.

item.title: 13 Terrific New Children’s Books Out in March 2026
item.description: Check out the best new children's books out in March 2026, including fabulous picture books and middle grade books.

item.title: Good Trouble: 8 Nonfiction Books on Resistance
item.description: Don't get it twisted—we've always been resisting, and these books show how we can keep it going.

item.title: Tips to Help Keep Your Eyes Healthy
Physical and Emotional Symptoms of Depression
10 of the Best New Romance Books to Read in March
item.description: This month's new romance releases are all standalones or series starters, so you can dive right into the swoons!

item.title: 7 Graphic Books about Spiritual and Religious Journeys
item.description: These comics and graphic books explore issues of faith, spirituality, and religion, from personal journeys through faith to adaptations of epics.

item.title: The Harrowing Journey Home for Families Leaving Immigration Detention
item.description: Parents and children from a detention center in Texas found themselves dropped at a border town shelter with few means to leave.

item.title: Tuscan Melting Cabbage
item.description: Groceries are expensive right now, so I’ve been leaning hard on the cheap staples. This melting cabbage with a garlicky…

item.title: As Texas Restricts Cashless Bail, More People Will Be Jailed for Months Based on an Accusation
item.description: Despite evidence that cashless bail doesn’t increase crime, several states are moving to restrict it.

item.title: Colorful Swimwear & Printed Coverups for Spring Travel
item.description: Eres Bikini, Irene Neurwirth Earrings, Celine Sunglasses (similar here) After another round of snow in the Northeast, and even Charleston seeing… The ...

item.title: The Documentary ‘Exodus’ Paints a Nuanced Picture of Life After Lockup
item.description: Shot over two years, the Critics’ Choice-nominated film values quiet moments. “We’re trying to refuse a spectacle,” says director Nimco Sheikhaden.

item.title: Weekly Meal Plan #79
item.description: I planned dinner, so you don’t have to! This weekly meal plan includes easy dinners plus a free shopping list!…

item.title: One-Pan Irish Chicken
item.description: This Irish chicken is my cozy mashup of pub vibes and weeknight reality. Seared chicken thighs baked over bacon, cabbage,…

item.title: Mississippi’s Black Voters Brace for Elections Ruling That Could Gut Supreme Court Clout
item.description: Black Mississippians won a Voting Rights Act case that challenges how the state elects supreme court justices. But that victory may be in jeopardy.

item.title: Beating by Guards, Not a Heart Attack, Killed Man in Mississippi Prison, Report Shows
item.description: FBI is now investigating after a report showed that Mississippi guards beat an incarcerated person to death.
